v1_status.summary: v1 (Apps Script + Sheets) is feature-complete through Phase 12 (Slack gate, action_category/action_type classification, hidden internal tabs). Lives entirely under apps_script/ and remains functional during the v2 migration.
v1_status.kept_until: Phase J of v2 (parallel-run validation + cutover)

v2_status.current_phase_name: Parallel-run validation vs v1 → cutover → decommission apps_script/

deployment.note: Use the Supabase connection POOLER (port 6543, host aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com, user postgres.tqdvbbfhgcqzwhpgwhdw) for DATABASE_URL — the direct db.<ref>.supabase.co:5432 host is IPv6-only and unreachable from Vercel.

A.name: Repo scaffold: Next.js app + Drizzle schema + Supabase project + Vercel deploy

C.name: Port shared infra to TS: rules engine, findings schema, Groq client, dedup, impact scorer, action-meta classifier

D.name: Build Performance & Budget Analyst + Quality & Structure Analyst

E.name: Build Audience & Copy Analyst + Search Intelligence Analyst + Market Intelligence Analyst + Landing Page Scorer

F.name: Synthesis pipeline + daily-audit GitHub Actions workflow, end-to-end with real data

G.name: Dashboard: Overview (budget bug fixed) + Action Plan page with approve/reject

J.name: Parallel-run validation vs v1 → cutover → decommission apps_script/

phase_a_progress: Created web/ Next.js 16 app (TypeScript, Tailwind, App Router, src dir, eslint).
Wrote web/src/db/schema.ts — full Postgres schema (raw snapshot tables + agent layer tables) per plan.
Wrote web/src/db/index.ts (lazy db client, null-safe if DATABASE_URL unset) and web/drizzle.config.ts.
Added db:generate/db:push/db:studio scripts to web/package.json and web/.env.example.
Replaced web/src/app/page.tsx with Overview scaffold + DB connection check.
phase_b_progress: Wrote web/src/app/api/ingest/route.ts — Bearer-auth POST route mapping each Raw_* array to its raw snapshot table (chunked inserts, campaigns_daily upserted by campaignId+date, ads jsonb fields parsed from *_json strings, negative_keywords id generated as run_date_index).
Repointed google_ads_script.js: APPS_SCRIPT_WEBHOOK_URL -> https://web-seven-rho-96.vercel.app/api/ingest, INGEST_SECRET set, postToAppsScript_ now sends Authorization: Bearer header.
Verified end-to-end locally with a sample collect payload (all 8 Raw_* tables written, jsonb/null mappings correct), then cleaned up test rows.
Deployed to Vercel production; verified /api/ingest accepts valid Bearer token (200) and rejects invalid (401).
Ran graphify update . to refresh the knowledge graph with the new web/ Next.js code (802 nodes, 1097 edges, 78 communities).
phase_c_progress: Created web/src/agents/ with schema.ts (VALID enums + Finding/AnalystOutput types + validateFindings/normalizeFinding, ported from apps_script/config.js + agents/_common.js).

Ported Groq client to web/src/agents/llm.ts (callLLM, fetch+retry/backoff, GROQ_API_KEY from process.env, token usage tracked in the token_usage table, daily ceiling read from config.GROQ_DAILY_TOKEN_CEILING).
Ported RulesEngine to web/src/agents/rules/rulesEngine.ts (RulesEngine.load(defaults) reads RULE_* rows from config table in one query) plus getConfigValue/getTargets/isDryRun.
Ported DeduplicationAgent to web/src/agents/synthesis/dedup.ts (entity-bucket + Jaccard title-signature clustering, >=0.5 threshold), operating on the nested v2 Finding shape.
Ported ImpactScorer to web/src/agents/synthesis/impactScorer.ts (SCORE_WEIGHTS, PRIORITY_THRESHOLDS, score/priority assignment), reading nested estimated_impact.magnitude.
Defined v2 agent-name + finding-id-prefix conventions in web/src/agents/synthesis/agentNames.ts for the 6 consolidated Analysts (replacing v1's 14-agent names).
Ported _deriveActionMeta_ to web/src/agents/synthesis/actionMeta.ts, remapped to the new agent names/prefixes.
Ported the 3 SynthesisManager cross-agent patterns to web/src/agents/synthesis/crossAgentPatterns.ts, remapped to the new agent names/prefixes.

Ported the AnalystSpec harness to web/src/agents/runAnalyst.ts: runPureLLMAnalyst + runRuleBasedAnalyst + buildSystemPrompt/buildRuleSystemPrompt/formatDataContext (LAST_COLLECT_* read from config table). Returns AnalystOutput per CLAUDE.md's universal schema; does not write to the DB (Phase F's job).
npm run build and npm run lint both pass clean.
phase_d_notes: Phase D Analysts should set finding.agent to AGENTS.PERFORMANCE_BUDGET / AGENTS.QUALITY_STRUCTURE (web/src/agents/synthesis/agentNames.ts) and prefix finding.id per the conventions documented there, so actionMeta.ts and crossAgentPatterns.ts (Phase F) classify them correctly.

Phase F still needs: synthesisManager.ts wiring dedup -> crossAgentPatterns -> ImpactScorer -> actionMeta -> action_plan rows (PlanFormatter's plan_id/run-date-clear logic was read but not yet ported, since it's Phase F's job).
phase_d_progress: Added web/src/agents/data.ts: loadAccountData() (reads campaigns/ad_groups/keywords/ads/extensions snapshot tables in parallel) + micros() helper, ported from AgentCommon.readCampaigns/readAdGroups/readKeywords/readAds/readExtensions + AgentCommon.micros.

Added web/src/agents/analysts/performanceBudgetAnalyst.ts: buildPerformanceBudgetAnalystSpec() + detectPerformanceBudget(), merging v1's PerformanceAnalyst + BidBudgetAnalyst + ConversionHealthChecker into one rule-based RuleBasedAnalystSpec for AGENTS.PERFORMANCE_BUDGET. 16 detect rules ported 1:1 (cpa-over- -> cpa-overage-, roas-low- -> roas-shortfall- to match agentNames.ts conventions; budget-locked-/rank-locked-/idle-budget- kept as-is).

Added web/src/agents/analysts/qualityStructureAnalyst.ts: buildQualityStructureAnalystSpec() + detectQualityStructure(), merging v1's QualityScoreInspector + AccountStructureReviewer + ExtensionAuditor into one rule-based RuleBasedAnalystSpec for AGENTS.QUALITY_STRUCTURE. Structural and extension finding ids reprefixed to structure-* / extension-* per agentNames.ts conventions; low-qs-/no-qs-spend- kept as-is.

Both specs combine all source agents' RULE_* defaults into one RulesEngine.load() call (one config query each) and include a no-op formatDataForPrompt (required by AnalystSpec but unused by the rule-based path).
npm run build and npm run lint both pass clean.

Ran graphify update . (AST-only, no LLM cost): incremental detect found 4 changed files (progress.json, data.ts, performanceBudgetAnalyst.ts, qualityStructureAnalyst.ts) plus 1 deleted (.clasp.json); merged + re-clustered to 910 nodes / 1305 edges / 76 communities.
phase_e_notes: Phase E builds the 4 remaining Analysts (Audience & Copy, Search Intelligence, Market Intelligence, Landing Page Scorer) following the same pattern: a buildXSpec() factory in web/src/agents/analysts/ that loads data via data.ts (extend it with searchTerms/negativeKeywords readers as needed) and returns a RuleBasedAnalystSpec or AnalystSpec, with agent/id-prefix conventions from agentNames.ts.

Search Intelligence and Market Intelligence are 'pure LLM' analysts per CLAUDE.md (runPureLLMAnalyst, not rule-based) — they need formatDataForPrompt to actually render data, unlike Phase D's rule-based specs.
phase_e_progress: Extended web/src/agents/data.ts with readSearchTerms() and readNegativeKeywords() (search_terms/negative_keywords snapshot tables) plus SearchTermRow/NegativeKeywordRow types.

Added web/src/agents/analysts/audienceCopyAnalyst.ts: buildAudienceCopyAnalystSpec() + detectAudienceCopy(), merging v1's AudienceAnalyst + AdCopyCritic into one rule-based RuleBasedAnalystSpec for AGENTS.AUDIENCE_COPY. 9 detect rules ported 1:1 (AudienceAnalyst rules reprefixed audience-*, AdCopyCritic rules reprefixed copy-* except low-ctr-ad-* kept as-is per agentNames.ts). BRAND_KEYWORDS read via getConfigValue and combined with RULE_* defaults from both source agents.

Added web/src/agents/analysts/searchIntelligenceAnalyst.ts: buildSearchIntelligenceAnalystSpec(), a pure-LLM AnalystSpec for AGENTS.SEARCH_INTELLIGENCE merging KeywordMiner + NegativeKwHunter + SearchTermPatternAnalyzer into one 3-section prompt (add-negative-/new-keyword-/search-term-pattern- id prefixes). Ported _buildNegativeMatcher_/_negativeMatches_/_reEscape_ as local helpers operating on camelCase NegativeKeywordRow fields.

Added web/src/agents/analysts/marketIntelligenceAnalyst.ts: buildMarketIntelligenceAnalystSpec(), a pure-LLM AnalystSpec for AGENTS.MARKET_INTELLIGENCE merging CompetitiveIntel + CategoryTrendSpotter (brand-defense IS table, comparison-query table, top-50-impressions trend table). actionMeta.ts already routes this agent to action_category='insight' regardless of id.

Added web/src/agents/analysts/landingPageScorer.ts: buildLandingPageScorerSpec(), a pure-LLM AnalystSpec for AGENTS.LANDING_PAGE. Ported _scorePage from UrlFetchApp to Node's global fetch (redirect detection via redirect:'manual' probe + redirect:'follow' main fetch), same LP_MAX_PAGES/LP_SLOW_RESPONSE_MS/LP_HEAVY_BYTES/CTA-verb/soft-404 checks as v1.
npm run build and npm run lint both pass clean.

Ran graphify update . (AST-only, no LLM cost): incremental detect found 6 changed files (progress.json, data.ts, and the 4 new analyst files) plus 1 deleted (.clasp.json). build_merge's dedup pass found 236 duplicate nodes accumulated from prior incremental runs (187 exact, 49 fuzzy) and collapsed them, taking the graph from 912 to 722 nodes / 1282 edges / 44 communities. Verified all 27 nodes from the 4 new Phase E analyst files are present post-merge. NOTE: graphify's CLI `cluster-only` does NOT reload merged in-memory chunks from build_merge (it re-reads graph.json from disk and build_merge doesn't persist) — had to call to_json(..., force=True) directly after build_merge+cluster to actually save the merge.
phase_f_progress: Added web/src/agents/synthesis/planFormatter.ts: formatActionPlan(scored, runDate) -> ActionPlanRow[], pure function ported from PlanFormatter.js's run() ordering (P1 first, then score desc) + plan_id format plan_YYYYMMDD_NNN, using actionMeta.ts's deriveActionMeta (Phase C).

Added web/src/agents/synthesis/synthesisManager.ts: runSynthesis(findings, runDate) orchestrating dedup (dedup.ts) -> cross-agent patterns (crossAgentPatterns.ts) -> impact scoring (impactScorer.ts) -> formatActionPlan -> idempotent action_plan rewrite for runDate (clear+insert), ported from SynthesisManager.js's runSynthesisManager. written count now reflects actual DB inserts, not just planRows.length.

Added web/src/agents/runDailyAudit.ts (npm run daily-audit): runs all 6 Analysts (isolated per-agent try/catch), persists raw findings (replace-by-run_date), calls runSynthesis, stamps config.LAST_AUDIT_DATE/LAST_AUDIT_SUMMARY.

BUG FOUND AND FIXED: @/db (web/src/db/index.ts) reads process.env.DATABASE_URL at module-eval time, but ESM resolves a module's full import graph (including @/db) BEFORE the importing script's own top-level statements run -- so dotenv calls placed inside runDailyAudit.ts itself were always too late, leaving db=null silently (writes were skipped but logs still claimed success because `written: planRows.length` didn't check db). Fixed by adding web/scripts/load-env.cjs (loads .env then .env.local via CJS require, executed via `tsx --require` BEFORE the ESM graph loads) and changing package.json's daily-audit script to `tsx --require ./scripts/load-env.cjs src/agents/runDailyAudit.ts`. Also fixed synthesisManager.ts's `written` to only count rows actually inserted.

BUG FOUND AND FIXED: web/src/agents/analysts/landingPageScorer.ts and web/src/agents/llm.ts used `fetch()` with no timeout, which can hang indefinitely (observed: first end-to-end run hung >25min with near-zero CPU, had to be killed). Added AbortSignal.timeout() — 15s per landing-page fetch (LP_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS), 60s per Groq call (LLM.request_timeout_ms).

Created .github/workflows/daily-audit.yml: cron 06:00 UTC + workflow_dispatch, runs `npm run ci && npm run daily-audit` in web/ on ubuntu-latest/node 22, with DATABASE_URL and GROQ_API_KEY from repo secrets.

Verified end-to-end against the real Supabase DB and Groq API (npm run daily-audit): 6 analysts ran (3 rule-based with 1 LLM call each, 3 pure-LLM), 1 raw finding (performance_budget_analyst/pacing-account, P1), dedup 1->1 (0 merged), 0 cross-agent patterns, scored P1=1, action_plan got 1 row (plan_20260612_001, action_category=manual, action_type=change_bid_strategy, score=2), config.LAST_AUDIT_DATE/LAST_AUDIT_SUMMARY stamped. Confirmed via direct DB query post-run.
npm run build, npm run lint, npx tsc --noEmit all pass clean.
phase_g_progress: Added web/src/lib/dates.ts: todayUTC/daysAgoUTC/firstOfMonthUTC/dayOfMonthUTC/relativeTimeFromNow shared by dashboard pages.
Added web/src/app/components/Nav.tsx and wired it into web/src/app/layout.tsx (links: Overview, Action Plan; updated metadata title/description).

Rewrote web/src/app/page.tsx as the Overview dashboard: total daily budget = SUM(budget_micros) WHERE status='ENABLED' from campaigns, shown with 'as of <relative time of campaigns.updated_at MAX>' to fix the v1 staleness bug; MTD pacing card compares campaigns_daily-derived MTD spend vs (daily budget * day-of-month), flags out-of-tolerance using RULE_PACING_TOLERANCE from config; 7d/30d/MTD KPI rows (spend, conversions, ROAS, CPA) from campaigns_daily; latest-audit card (config.LAST_AUDIT_DATE/SUMMARY + action_plan P1/P2/P3/pending counts); Groq token usage today vs config.GROQ_DAILY_TOKEN_CEILING. Page marked `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` so it isn't baked as a static page at build time.

Added web/src/app/action-plan/page.tsx: tabs for auto/manual/insight (action_category, via ?tab= searchParam, Next 16 async searchParams Promise), each tab shows action_plan rows sorted by score desc with priority/status/action_type/score badges, expandable <details> for what/why/action, target, plan_id/run_date. Pending rows get ApproveButtons.
Added web/src/app/action-plan/ApproveButtons.tsx (client component): Approve/Reject buttons POST to /api/approve, then router.refresh().
Added web/src/app/api/approve/route.ts: POST {planId, action: 'approve'|'reject'} -> updates action_plan.status + inserts an approvals row (id appr_<planId>_<ts>).

Verified end-to-end with `npm run dev`: Overview renders correctly with empty campaigns/campaigns_daily (shows Rs0/day, 'unknown' staleness, all KPI rows '-'/0 -- raw snapshot tables are currently empty since Phase B's test rows were cleaned up and no real collect run has happened yet); Action Plan page correctly shows the 1 real row from Phase F (plan_20260612_001, manual tab, P1, score 2.00) with working Approve/Reject round-trip against the live Supabase DB (tested both directions, then reset the row back to status=pending and removed the test approvals rows).
npm run build and npm run lint both pass clean.
phase_h_progress: Added web/src/agents/implementation.ts: runImplementation(runDate) ports v1's ImplementationManager — deriveChanges() (increase_budget -> adjust_budget with +MAX_BUDGET_SHIFT_PCT cap; add_negatives -> deriveNegatives() re-deriving candidates from live search_terms/negative_keywords scoped to the approved item's target, zero-conv + cost >= NEGATIVE_KW_MIN_WASTE, top NEGATIVE_MAX_PER_RUN by cost desc, excluding already-blocked terms via a ported buildNegativeMatcher), validateChange() (budget cap + non-empty negative term), persistChange() (upsert into pending_changes by deterministic change_id, dry_run also writes change_log), readApprovedAutoItems() (approved+auto action_plan rows not already queued/executing/done in pending_changes).

Added web/src/agents/runHourlyImplementation.ts (npm run hourly-implementation) and .github/workflows/hourly-implementation.yml (cron 0 * * * * + workflow_dispatch, npm ci && npm run hourly-implementation with DATABASE_URL secret).

Added web/src/app/api/pending-changes/route.ts (GET, Bearer/?secret= auth via INGEST_SECRET, returns queued pending_changes rows and flips them to executing) and web/src/app/api/execute-result/route.ts (POST, same auth, updates pending_changes to done/error + upserts change_log row).

Repointed google_ads_script.js execute mode: runExecute_() now polls GET _apiUrl_('pending-changes') (derived by replacing /api/ingest with /api/<name> in APPS_SCRIPT_WEBHOOK_URL), applies each change via the existing applyChange_/campaignById_/adGroupById_ primitives (unchanged), and POSTs results to /api/execute-result.

Added pending_changes.params jsonb column via a one-off raw-SQL ALTER TABLE (drizzle-kit push hangs against this Supabase project; raw db.execute(sql\`...\`) workaround documented for future additive schema changes).

Verified end-to-end with synthetic dry-run data (DRY_RUN defaults true, no config.DRY_RUN row exists): budget-increase derivation (100->120, +20%, within cap), negative-keyword derivation, validation, and pending_changes/change_log writes; also live-path tested the full /api/pending-changes -> /api/execute-result round trip (queued -> executing -> done with matching change_log row). All synthetic data and one-off scripts cleaned up afterward.
npm run build, npm run lint both pass clean.
phase_i_progress: Added web/src/app/history/page.tsx: read-only page displaying past audit runs and change_log entries, grouped by plan_id with before/after values, success/error status, and dry_run badges. Supports 200 entries limit.

Added web/src/app/brain/page.tsx, BrainForm.tsx, BrainEntry.tsx: full CRUD for brain_entries. BrainForm supports add/edit with category/source/sourceType/title/summary/keyPoints/rawText fields. BrainEntry shows inline details and edit/delete buttons (edit opens form inline, delete posts to API).
Added web/src/app/api/brain/route.ts (POST) and web/src/app/api/brain/[id]/route.ts (PUT/DELETE) for managing brain entries. Generates nanoid for new entries, upserts with onConflictDoUpdate pattern.

Added web/src/app/config/page.tsx and ConfigTable.tsx: editable table of config rows (key/value/description). Inline editing with Save/Cancel buttons, Add Config button for new rows. ConfigTable is a client component (useState for edit mode).
Added web/src/app/api/config/route.ts (POST/PUT) and web/src/app/api/config/[key]/route.ts (DELETE). Routes handle config CRUD with automatic updatedAt stamping.

Added web/src/agents/slack.ts: notifyActionPlanDigest(runDate) queries pending action_plan rows for the run_date and POSTs a Slack message with category breakdown + dashboard link button. Non-fatal if SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is unset or POST fails. Also exports sendSlackNotification() for direct webhook calls.
Integrated Slack notification into runDailyAudit.ts: calls notifyActionPlanDigest(runDate) after synthesis (non-blocking, failure logged but doesn't abort).
Updated Nav.tsx to include links to /history, /brain, /config pages (plus existing /, /action-plan).
Fixed Next.js 16 breaking changes: dynamic route handlers now receive params as Promise<{id:string}> and must await them. Updated brain/[id], config/[key] routes accordingly.
Fixed dateAdded to use ISO date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) instead of Date objects to match schema column type (date, not timestamp).
npm run build, npm run lint both pass clean. All routes, pages, and API handlers verified working.
phase_j_progress: Created PHASE_J_RUNBOOK.md: comprehensive guide for parallel-run validation (Week 1), cutover (Day 7+), and decommissioning. Includes pre-cutover checklist, step-by-step cutover procedure, emergency rollback path, and success metrics.

Built web/scripts/compare-runs.ts: validation helper script that queries v2 Postgres (findings + action_plan for a given run_date), displays P1/P2/P3 breakdown by category, and provides a checklist for manual spot-checking against v1 Google Sheets. Supports `npm run compare [YYYY-MM-DD]` (defaults to today). Non-invasive, read-only query.
Added `compare` script to web/package.json for easy daily execution.

Phase J is operational phase, not feature-building: runs both v1 and v2 in parallel for ~1 week, validates findings equivalence via daily spot-checks (manual + compare script), then cuts over when confident. Minimal code changes; mostly validation and operational steps.
